creator: shamaz.mazum@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #38)

Great news, thanks! I use llvm 16 right now.

As an additional (and currently completely optional) test, please let me know if you will be able to actually run any application which uses WebKit. (Unfortunately, that port doesn't build minibrowser). I am not sure if it is possible because of difference in ABI in the C++ standard library provided by the port and the base (I never tested it).

If you are familiar with Common Lisp, you can run a demo browser provided with cl-webkit2
